metadata.description: shofer.dev's Claude Code plugins. Includes live-memory — a cheap, persistent, read-only codebase memory your agent queries via ask_live_memory instead of re-reading files.

plugins.name: live-memory
plugins.description: Persistent, long-context, read-only codebase Q&A companion. A cheap large-context model accumulates codebase knowledge across sessions; agents ask it via the ask_live_memory MCP tool instead of re-reading the whole repo.
